---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Activités des ménages

Nous allons charger les données des activités des ménages des OR Alaotra et Marovoay.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library (gt) # Easily create presentation - ready display tables

# Loading observatories data
res_deb <- read_dta("data/res_deb.dta")
# Loading household data
res_m_a <- read_dta("data/res_m_a.dta")

```

## Activités agricoles

```{r}
# Loading Agricultural activities data
res_sac <- read_dta("data/res_sac.dta") # Year, j5 # General agricultural activity 
res_sac3 <- read_dta("data/res_sac3.dta") # Year, j5 # Agricultural activity
```

## Activités non-agricoles

```{r}
# Loading non-Agricultural activities data
res_sac4 <- read_dta("data/res_sac4.dta") # Year, j5 
res_sac5 <- read_dta("data/res_sac5.dta") # Year, j5
```
